issues.title: Critical: Login service returning 503 for all users
issues.description: All users unable to log in since 02:00 UTC. Auth service pod crashed after memory limit exceeded. DevOps alerted. 200+ customer support tickets raised.
issues.business_impact: 100% login failure rate. Enterprise SLA breach imminent. $500K ARR customers affected.

issues.title: Deploy hotfix for auth service memory leak
issues.description: Root cause identified as unbounded session cache growth. Patch ready in branch fix/auth-memory-leak. Needs review and deploy to prod.
issues.business_impact: Restores login for all users immediately after deploy.

issues.title: Send outage status update to enterprise customers
issues.description: Communications team needs engineering sign-off on status page message before publishing. Draft ready in Notion. Must go out before 16:00 UTC.
issues.business_impact: Prevents churn during outage window. 3 enterprise accounts watching.
